title: Update test_medium.py and protocol tests to cover CCP-12 hop rendezvous and vectors
description: Add or update tests for synchronized hop channel computation, rendezvous in get_rx_candidates/detect_activity using SFN/EUI, reference ccp16-hop.json and ccp9_rendezvous.json. Ensure all vectors pass. Update test_protocol.py if channel decoding affected.
